original_query: SELECT MIN("EXPR0") FILTER (WHERE "g_3"), COUNT("SAL") FILTER (WHERE "g_0_f_1") FROM (SELECT "SAL", SUM("COMM") AS "EXPR0", GROUPING("SAL", "SAL" > 1000) = 0 AND "SAL" > 1000 IS TRUE AS "g_0_f_1", GROUPING("SAL", "SAL" > 1000) = 3 AS "g_3" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY GROUPING SETS(("SAL", "SAL" > 1000), ())) AS "t3"
rewritten_query: SELECT MIN("EXPR0") FILTER (WHERE "g_3"), COUNT("SAL") FILTER (WHERE "g_0_f_1") FROM (SELECT "SAL", SUM("COMM") AS "EXPR0", GROUPING("SAL", "SAL" > 1000) = 0 AND "SAL" > 1000 IS TRUE AS "g_0_f_1", GROUPING("SAL", "SAL" > 1000) = 3 AS "g_3" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY GROUPING SETS(("SAL", "SAL" > 1000), ())) AS "t3"
